## 比较表 | Function | `parseInt` | `parseFloat` | `Number` | `BigInt` | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Ignores Whitespace | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | `.map(FN)` | ❌ | ☑️ | ✅ | ✅ | | Supports Radix Arg | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | | Binary/Octal/Hex literals | ✅ | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | | Invalid chars `42 oh no` | `42` | `42` | `NaN` | `SyntaxError` |
